response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio consists of 100% spoken English dialogue between VTubers IRyS and Ouro Kronii, which matches the 'no vocal music' assessment in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON confirmed the absence of vocal music; manual transcription was performed for the entire duration to capture the dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Normal conversational pacing; subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal bursts with logical phrase grouping. Aggressive end-time truncation was applied in rapid exchanges to prevent cascading delays, and long sentences were split for readability.
